meta.title: תוכנית שנתית · אנגלית · תנופה · כיתה ח'
meta.subject: אנגלית
meta.examLabel: אין מבחן חיצוני · 5 mini-Tnufa הדרגתיים + Comprehensive Mini-Mock
meta.basedOn: english-3year-plan.md · english-grade8.md · English Curriculum 2020 · CEFR Companion Volume 2020 · Table of Specifications לתנופה ט'
meta.pedagogicalApproach: CLT + TBLT + Lexical Approach · Thematic Units · 4-shlavi scaffolding · Process Writing · Mini-Tnufa הדרגתי

units.name: Unit 0 · Bridge from ז'
units.description: Cambridge Re-test + סקירת ז' · 30 chunks חדשים · Lexical Notebook re-setup · רוויזיה של `to be` + Present Simple/Continuous.

units.name: Unit 1 · People I Admire
units.description: Past Simple (regular + 30 irregular) · Biography · Mini-Tnufa #1. סוף יחידה: Biography poster + presentation 1 דק'.

units.name: Unit 2 · Stories from Around the World
units.description: Past Continuous + שילוב עם Past Simple · Story · Comic strip מורחב · Mini-Tnufa #2. סוף יחידה: Class story collection.

units.name: Unit 3 · Healthy Choices
units.description: Modals (can/should/must) · Quantifiers · Brochure + Recipe + Advertisement · Mini-Tnufa #3. סוף יחידה: Class wellness fair.

units.name: Unit 4 · Travel & Plans
units.description: Going-to future · Comparatives · Timetable + Brochure + Letter · Mini-Tnufa #4. סוף יחידה: 3-day itinerary + presentation.

units.name: Unit 5 · My Opinion Matters
units.description: Opinion chunks · Blog post + Diary entry · class debate בסיסי. סוף יחידה: Class blog.

units.name: Unit 6 · Mini-Tnufa Project
units.description: סינתזה — קריאת טקסט אורך · סיכום בכתב · פסקת דעה · Comprehensive Mini-Mock (45 דק'). הכנת קרקע רכה לכיתה ט'.

topics: Cambridge Placement Re-test (השוואה לתחילת ז') (1ש)
השוואה לעצמי תחילת ז' + קביעת יעדים אישיים (2ש)
Lexical Notebook ח' setup — Function tags + Common mistakes (1ש)
רוויזיה של `to be` + Present Simple (1ש)
רוויזיה של Present Continuous + השוואה ל-Present Simple (2ש)
Diagnostic activity — איפה אני עומד.ת? (1ש)
Connectors: for example, on the other hand, however, also (1ש)
Cause & Effect: because of, in order to, so that, as a result (1ש)
Bridge Diagnostic — 30 דק' (לא mock!) (1ש)
Past Simple — regular verbs: -ed ending (1ש)
Spelling rules: stop → stopped, study → studied (1ש)
Listening — short Past Simple narrative (1ש)
Top 10 irregular: be→was/were, have→had, do→did, go→went, come→came (2ש)
say→said, give→gave, tell→told, read→read, run→ran (1ש)
Flashcards practice (Quizlet) (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 1 · 20 Irregular Verbs נוספים + Time Markers
topics: 10 הבאים: get, make, take, see, know, think, eat, drink, write, sleep (2ש)
10 אחרונים: sit, stand, hear, feel, find, win, leave, give, tell, bring (1ש)
Past time markers: yesterday, last week, ago, when I was younger (1ש)
Biography text type — structure (birth, childhood, achievements) (1ש)
Reading — biography of Malala / Einstein / Ronaldo (100-150 words) (2ש)
Vocabulary work — adjectives of character (kind, brave, smart, funny) (1ש)
Writing — mini-biography (35 מילים) — Process Writing 4 steps (2ש)
Speaking — 1-min presentation of person I admire (1ש)
**Mini-Tnufa #1** — Biography + 7 שאלות (15 דק') + retrospective (1ש)
Past Continuous: was/were + V-ing (2ש)
Sequence markers: first, then, after that, finally (1ש)
Feelings vocab: happy, sad, surprised, scared, excited (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 2 · Past Simple + Past Continuous Combined
topics: השילוב: "I was reading when the phone rang" (2ש)
Reading — short folk tale (150-180 words) (1ש)
Speaking — "Where were you and what were you doing when..." (1ש)
Story structure — beginning / middle / end (1ש)
Reading — short story 150 words + comic strip מורחב (2ש)
Listening — story podcast for kids (BBC) (1ש)
Process Writing: Plan (1ש)
Process Writing: Draft + Revise (peer feedback) (2ש)
Process Writing: Edit + Final (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 2 wrap · Class Story Collection + Mini-Tnufa #2
topics: Class story collection — sharing stories (2ש)
**Mini-Tnufa #2** — Story + 10 שאלות (15-20 דק') + retrospective (1ש)
Unit 2 Assessment (1ש)
Health vocab: tired, energetic, sick, healthy, exhausted (1ש)
Modals: can (ability/permission), should (advice) (2ש)
Health chunks: take care of yourself, get enough sleep, eat healthy food (1ש)
Modal must / mustn't vs. don't have to (2ש)
Quantifiers: some, any, much, many, a lot of (1ש)
Countable vs. uncountable (1ש)
Brochure text type — structure + features (1ש)
Reading — brochure of fitness club + recipe (2ש)
Listening — podcast about healthy habits (1ש)
Process Writing: Plan brochure on "How to be healthy" (1ש)
Process Writing: Draft + Revise (1ש)
Mid-Year Assessment (2ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 3 wrap · Class Wellness Fair + Mini-Tnufa #3
topics: Class wellness fair — present your brochure (2ש)
Role-play — doctor/patient (1ש)
**Mini-Tnufa #3** — Brochure + 8 שאלות (20 דק') + retrospective (1ש)
Travel vocab: countries, cities, transport, accommodation (1ש)
Going-to future — plans + predictions (2ש)
Travel chunks: take a flight, book a hotel, pack a suitcase, check in (1ש)
Comparatives — short adj (bigger) + long adj (more interesting) (2ש)
Superlatives intro (the biggest, the most) (1ש)
Reading — brochure of hotel + travel review (1ש)
Reading — timetable of train/bus (1ש)
Reading — letter from pen-pal planning visit (1ש)
Writing — friendly letter (40 מילים) — Process Writing (1ש)
Plan a 3-day itinerary (group work) (2ש)
Listening — airport announcement + travel vlogger podcast (1ש)
Mini-presentation of itinerary (1ש)
weeks.note: 🎯 בכיתה ט' תנופה אנגלית 11.2 — לא רלוונטי לח' ישירות

topics: Speaking — present your itinerary (2ש)
**Mini-Tnufa #4** — Travel brochure + 9 שאלות (20 דק') + retrospective (1ש)
Unit 4 Assessment (1ש)
Opinion chunks: I think that, In my opinion, I believe, I agree/disagree (1ש)
Social media vocab: post, comment, share, follow, like (1ש)
Reading — blog post by teen about hobby (2ש)
Diary entry structure — date, opening, body, closing (1ש)
Reading — diary entry of teen (1ש)
Writing — diary entry (35 מילים) — Process Writing (2ש)
Writing — blog post (40 מילים) — Process Writing (2ש)
Class debate בסיסי — בעד/נגד (1ש)
Listening — opinion podcast for teens (1ש)
Class blog — each student uploads one post (Padlet) (2ש)
Unit 5 Assessment — blog + opinion writing (1ש)
Speaking — share favorite class blog post (1ש)
Project intro — choose free topic (sport, science, music, fashion) (1ש)
Resource research — how to search in English (2ש)
Project research — read 2-3 sources adapted to level (2ש)
Strategy: Cross-text comparison + Context clues (1ש)
Source notes (1ש)
Process Writing: summary paragraph (40 מילים) (2ש)
Process Writing: opinion paragraph (40 מילים) (2ש)
Project presentations — 2-3 min each (2ש)
Peer feedback rubric (1ש)
**Comprehensive Mini-Mock** — 25 שאלות, 45 דק' (לא mock מלא!) (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 6 wrap · Mini-Mock Retrospective + Year Reflection
topics: Comprehensive Mini-Mock retrospective — איזה שאלות נכונות, איזה לא, למה (2ש)
Year reflection — מפת מיומנויות מצטברת + יעדים לכיתה ט' (1ש)
Preview of grade ט' + summer reading list (Penguin Level 2) (1ש)

hoursDistribution.totalDoesNotEqualSumWarning: סך השעות לפי skill (127) שונה מהסכום לפי unit כי הוראה אינטגרטיבית — אותה שעה משרתת מספר skills במקביל.
